output: Implemented batch 1. Added `useSelectedShotIds`, added the compact `ShotsPanel`, and updated `useExternalDrop` to do image-first shot drops followed by `switchToFinalVideo()` when a final video exists. Verified with `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.test.tsx` and `npx tsc --noEmit`. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/replace-the-preview-panel-in-20260406-1826/execution_batch_1.json`.
deviations: Advisory observation mismatch: executor claimed files not observed in git status/content hash delta: .megaplan/plans/replace-the-preview-panel-in-20260406-1826/execution_batch_1.json
Advisory observation mismatch: git status/content hash delta found unclaimed files: .megaplan/debt.json

Advisory audit finding: Git status shows changed files not claimed by any task: .megaplan/debt.json, .megaplan/plans/make-videogenerationmodal-20260406-1855, .megaplan/plans/replace-the-preview-panel-in-20260406-1826
Advisory audit finding: Sense check SC4 is missing an executor acknowledgment.
Advisory audit finding: Sense check SC5 is missing an executor acknowledgment.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added `useSelectedShotIds` to derive highlighted shots from selected timeline clips. It resolves clip ids through `config.pinnedShotGroups` first, then falls back to `meta[clipId].asset -> registry.assets[assetKey].generationId` and a shot image generation lookup. Empty selections and missing data return an empty set safely.

Added `ShotsPanel` as a compact, horizontal-scrolling 2-row shots browser. It uses `useShots()` and `useShotFinalVideos(projectId)`, filters by case-insensitive shot name, supports a Related-only toggle, uses the exact shot drag payload shape with video generations filtered out, and stops keydown propagation from the search input. File length is 169 lines.

Updated `useExternalDrop` to preserve the existing image-based shot drop path, then call `switchToFinalVideo()` when `useShotFinalVideos(selectedProjectId)` contains a final video for the dropped shot. No export changes were needed from `useSwitchToFinalVideo`. The targeted drop test module now covers both the image-only path and the final-video follow-up path.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Verified both derivation paths: pinned groups are resolved first by clip id, and ungrouped clips fall back through asset generation ids to matching shot images. Empty selection or missing timeline data yields an empty highlighted set.

Verified `ShotsPanel.tsx` is 169 lines. Drag start uses `setShotDragData({ shotId, shotName, imageGenerationIds })` with video generations filtered out, and the search input stops keydown propagation.

Verified the drop flow remains image-first, then switches via `useSwitchToFinalVideo` only when `finalVideoMap.has(shot.id)`. The image-only path is unchanged when no final video exists, and the test module covers both behaviors.
